heading: The Lingua Difference
subtitle: Every tool designed to make you speak with confidence — from your very first lesson.

cards.title: AI Speech Coach
cards.desc: Real-time pronunciation analysis with phoneme-level feedback. Master every sound from schwa to stress patterns.

cards.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 016.5 17H20"/><path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 014 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 016.5 2z"/><path d="M8 8h8M8 12h6M8 16h4"/></svg>
cards.title: Immersive Stories
cards.desc: Learn through interactive narratives set in New York, London, Sydney and beyond. Every story builds real-world skills.

cards.title: Cultural Insights
cards.desc: Beyond grammar — understand idioms, humor, etiquette, and context. Speak English the way native speakers really do.

cards.title: Smart Recall
cards.desc: Spaced repetition powered by cognitive science. Words move from short-term memory to lasting fluency — naturally.

highlight_desc: Practice real conversations anytime with our advanced AI that adapts to your level, corrects your grammar, and expands your vocabulary naturally — just like talking to a patient, encouraging friend.
